name: Nozaki Insatsu Shigyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Nozaki Insatsu Shigyo Co., Ltd. engages in commercial printing business in Japan. It provides posters, catalogs, pamphlets, calendars, symbooks, and business forms. The company also offers CAD products, tags, labels, and printers. In addition, it provides wrapping and packaging products, as well as packaging and food packaging materials. The company was formerly known as Nozaki Shigyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nozaki Insatsu Shigyo Co., Ltd. in 1962. Nozaki Insatsu Shigyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1940 and is based in Kyoto, Japan.
